business.name: Grande Prairie Pizza Palace
business.description: Local pizza restaurant with outdated website

observedSignals: Page title found: "Grande Prairie Pizza Palace - Best Pizza in Grande Prairie"

issues.title: Primary conversion CTA is weak or not obvious
issues.evidence: The scan did not find clear high-intent CTA language like "get a quote", "book now", or "request service".
issues.recommendation: Add one dominant above-the-fold CTA and repeat it in sticky/mobile positions.

issues.title: No lead-capture form detected
issues.evidence: The page HTML did not include a form element.
issues.recommendation: Add a short quote/request form with service type, contact info, and urgency.

issues.title: Trust proof is not prominent
issues.evidence: The scan did not detect common review, testimonial, rating, guarantee, licensed, or insured language.
issues.recommendation: Add reviews, proof badges, before/after examples, and service guarantees near the CTA.

issues.title: Initial response appears slow
issues.evidence: Server response took 1450ms from the audit runner.
issues.recommendation: Compress assets, reduce render-blocking scripts, and audit hosting/cache configuration.

recommendations.title: Conversion-first homepage pass
recommendations.description: Clarify the hero, add a dominant service CTA, strengthen proof, and remove friction from the first action.

recommendations.title: Lead capture + follow-up system
recommendations.description: Add a quote/request flow, route leads by urgency, and trigger owner/customer follow-up so inquiries do not go cold.

recommendations.title: Full implementation plan
recommendations.description: Turn the audit into a prioritized build plan covering page structure, local SEO, automation, CRM handoff, and measurement.

implementationEstimate.basis: Based on 4 detected issues, current score 45/100, and whether conversion plus automation work is required.
